# Clusters_2026


<!-- WARNING: THIS FILE WAS AUTOGENERATED! DO NOT EDIT! -->

Esta es una biblioteca simple donde generamos 2 clases una para contener
a los puntos y otra para generar los agrupamientos de los puntos

## Developer Guide

Esta biblioteca es muy simple y solo la generamos para ver las
capacidades de Nbdev

### Install Clusters_2026 in Development mode

``` sh
# make sure Clusters_2026 package is installed in development mode
$ pip install -e .

# make changes under nbs/ directory
# ...

# compile to have changes apply to Clusters_2026
$ nbdev_prepare
```

## Usage

### Installation

Install latest from the GitHub
[repository](https://github.com/msalazarcgeo/Clusters_2026):

``` sh
$ pip install git+https://github.com/msalazarcgeo/Clusters_2026.git
```

or from [conda](https://anaconda.org/msalazarcgeo/Clusters_2026)

``` sh
$ conda install -c msalazarcgeo Clusters_2026
```

or from [pypi](https://pypi.org/project/Clusters_2026/)

``` sh
$ pip install Clusters_2026
```

### Documentation

Documentation can be found hosted on this GitHub
[repository](https://github.com/msalazarcgeo/Clusters_2026)’s
[pages](https://msalazarcgeo.github.io/Clusters_2026/). Additionally you
can find package manager specific guidelines on
[conda](https://anaconda.org/msalazarcgeo/Clusters_2026) and
[pypi](https://pypi.org/project/Clusters_2026/) respectively.
